com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.pinentry

Interface RNIBPINEntryListener

  • All Superinterfaces:
    PINEntryListener
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ExtendedRNIBPINEntryListener

    public interface RNIBPINEntryListener
extends PINEntryListener

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onSlidBackSpace()
      Invoked when slid to Backspace button.
      void onSlidCancel()
      Invoked when slid to Cancel button.
      void onSlidDown()
      Invoked when slid below the keypad area.
      void onSlidEnter()
      Invoked when slid to Enter button.
      void onSlidLeft()
      Invoked when slid to the left of the keypad area.
      void onSlidNoDigitKey()
      Invoked when slid to the key with no digit.
      void onSlidNumberKey()
      Invoked when slid to a number key button.
      void onSlidRight()
      Invoked when slid to the right of the keypad area.
      void onSlidUp()
      Invoked when slid above the keypad area.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.pinentry.PINEntryListener

        onBackspace, onCancel, onClear, onError, onFinish, onKeyPress, onTimeout
